recommendations.title: A Perfect Man
recommendations.overview: A struggling writer finds a shortcut to fame, but a blackmailer threatens to ruin his perfect life.

recommendations.title: Guru
recommendations.overview: Matt, a charismatic coach, captivates crowds until he spirals into a disturbing downward spiral.

recommendations.title: Burn Out
recommendations.overview: Tony, a promising young motorcycle racer, is forced to do perilous drug runs to save the mother of his child from a dangerous mobster.

recommendations.title: Black Box
recommendations.overview: Mathieu is a young and talented black box analyst on a mission to solve the reason behind the deadly crash of a brand new aircraft. Yet, when the case is closed by authorities, Mathieu cannot help but sense there is something wrong with the evidence.

recommendations.title: Caged

recommendations.title: La Haine

recommendations.title: The Crimson Rivers
recommendations.overview: Two French policemen, one investigating a grisly murder at a remote mountain college, the other working on the desecration of a young girl's grave by skinheads, are brought together by the clues from their respective cases. Soon after they start work

recommendations.title: Post Mortem
recommendations.overview: A post mortem photographer and a little girl confront ghosts in a haunted village after the First World War.

recommendations.title: Me, Myself and Mum

recommendations.title: Evil Dead Rise
recommendations.overview: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.
